extra.reason: Standardized linked collection root selection as root plus outbound children, updated docs and tests.
Added ontology-neutral linked collection root terminology and --collection-root alias while keeping moc as the default ontology term.
Implemented hidden advanced global flags with standard-help notices and qipu --help-advanced disclosure.
Implemented grouped top-level help output with golden coverage.

Centralized note path placement in store guards; update and workspace merge now use shared helpers. Verified with cargo test -p qipu-core store::guards, cargo test --test cli_tests update, and cargo test --test cli_tests workspace.

Updated llm-tool-test fixtures to beta2 schema, added target binary config, replaced obsolete gates with command/script gates, and refreshed docs. Verified scenario discovery and dry-run parsing for tier 0 and tier 1.
Implemented top-level qipu status readiness command with human/json/records output and focused CLI coverage
Implemented hidden qipu context <id> compatibility alias with ADR documentation and regression coverage
Implemented hidden qipu link <from> <to> --type <type> compatibility alias with ADR documentation and regression coverage
Updated LLM fixture QIPU_STORE env values to use LLM_TOOL_TEST_FIXTURE_DIR and verified scenario dry-run setup plus fixture-store qipu status.
Removed stale generated llm-tool-test result artifacts from both result roots; no tracked result files were affected.
Audited command help-on-failure gaps with subagents and patched prescriptive guidance plus regression coverage.
Initial Homebrew formula exists at distribution/homebrew-qipu/Formula/qipu.rb with current v0.3.32 URLs and SHA256 values; remaining tap/publish work is tracked separately.
